def check_valid(s, a, b, start_index):

    if start_index == len(s):

        return False

    current_index = start_index

    while current_index < len(s):

        next_num = a + b

        if next_num > 2**31 -1:

            return False

        next_str = str(next_num)

        if not s.startswith(next_str, current_index):

            return False

        current_index += len(next_str)

        a, b = b, next_num

    return True

def generate_sequence(s, a, b, start_index):

    sequence = [a, b]

    current_index = start_index

    while current_index < len(s):

        next_num = a + b

        next_str = str(next_num)

        sequence.append(next_num)

        current_index += len(next_str)

        a, b = b, next_num

    return sequence
